prose: Fukui reactivity analysis on benzaldehyde (14 atoms: O, C×7, H×6) using DFT B3LYP/def2-TZVP (tier 'standard') in PySCF, gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1 (neutral); cation at charge +1/multiplicity 2, anion at charge -1/multiplicity 2. Fukui indices computed via Mulliken charge differences between N, N+1, and N-1 electron states. Most electrophilic site: atom 3 (C), f+ = 0.39938968. Most nucleophilic site: atom 1 (O), f- = 0.23839906. Integrity status: ok, trustworthy: true. Charge conservation checks passed for both f+ and f- (each sums to 1.0000). No warnings reported by the engine. CLI: /home/erobles/chem-skills/mcp_server/chemkit_engine/cli.py fukui --method dft --functional b3lyp --basis def2-tzvp [input.xyz]. Plot written to agent_call_01_plot.png in the task output directory.
